title: Suspicious Package at Screening
description: X-ray screening flags a suspicious object in passenger baggage. The passenger is uncooperative when questioned. The bag appears to have unusual weight distribution.

event.details: X-ray flagged unusual dense object in passenger's carry-on — operator cannot resolve
Passenger becoming verbally aggressive when asked to step aside for secondary screening
ETD trace detection positive on passenger's hands — explosive residue indicator
Passenger attempting to retrieve bag and leave screening area without clearance

optimal_response.primary_action: detain passenger and establish 100m cordon — notify APD Bomb Disposal Unit immediately
optimal_response.secondary_action: evacuate T4 screening area and halt all boarding for T4 — notify CAAS Duty Officer
optimal_response.do_not: Do not touch, X-ray again, or attempt to open the bag. Do not use mobile phones near the bag.
optimal_response.escalation: Treat as Level 5 bomb threat — full terminal evacuation protocol may be required
